'''Hokker''' was a male [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] slaver working for the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and crime-lord [[Krayn]] in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Hokker tried to persuade "[[Siri Tachi/Legends|Zora]]" (Siri Tachi) to help him sell a septuplet of [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] slaves behind Krayn's back. For his disloyalty and greed (discontent over Krayn's "percentage system"), Hokker was imprisoned by Krayn.

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Hokker and the initial scene of the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (comic series)|Jedi Quest]] ''comics (as also subsequent scenes affiliated with the Hokker storyline) do not appear in [[Jude Watson]]'s original ''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'' story.

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Quest 1|''Jedi Quest'' 1]] {{1st}}
